name: In West Valley City, multiple noisy jobs— which claim?

mainEntity.name: In West Valley City, multiple noisy jobs— which claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**File against current/last substantial employer contributing to loss; apportion if needed.**

Utah law attributes to 'last injurious exposure.'[1] West Valley follows state.

**Key factors:**
- Exposure percentages.
- Successive insurers.
- Medical allocation.
- All records.

Attorney coordinates filings.[2] Avoids gaps.

System handles multiples.
